overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school library, featuring a student character in dark robes exploring multi-level wooden balconies, candle-lit reading rooms, and narrow corridors with towering bookshelves. The environment features Gothic architecture with stone walls, arched windows, and warm ambient lighting from candles and lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper library balcony overlooking main hall

agents.ego_description: standing on upper balcony looking down at the main library floor, then beginning to walk forward along the wooden walkway

entered.detail: dark wooden balustrade with vertical spindles running along the balcony edge
ornate wrought iron chandelier hanging from the high ceiling above the main hall
tall wooden bookshelves visible on the floor below, filled with books
wall-mounted candle holders providing warm ambient light
green glass banker's lamp visible on a desk below the balcony

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an upper wooden balcony overlooking a vast library hall. Warm candlelight illuminates the scene from wall sconces, while a large chandelier hangs above the lower level filled with towering bookshelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: side reading room with study desks

events.description: turns right and enters a side reading room through a wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: turning right off the main balcony and entering a smaller side room with study desks and a portrait

entered.detail: classic green glass desk lamp on a wooden reading table
dark wood study desk with books and papers
framed painting of a figure in historical dress hanging on the stone wall
Gothic stone arch leading to the next corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a side reading room featuring wooden study desks with green banker's lamps and a portrait on the wall. The space is more intimate than the main hall, with stone archways leading further into the library.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with tall stained glass windows

events.description: enters corridor with tall windows allowing blue ambient light to mix with candlelight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a long corridor with towering stained glass windows on the right side

entered.detail: very tall Gothic windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass emitting blue light
massive stone support column between bookshelves
wooden table with books and a lamp for reading
large blue terrestrial globe on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long corridor illuminated by mixed lighting—warm candles and cool blue light filtering through towering stained glass windows. A large blue globe sits on a stand near the windows as the character passes wooden reading tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: main library floor with reading areas

events.description: turns left and re-enters the main library hall from the window corridor
passes another student in dark robes standing near the bookshelves

agents.ego_description: walking through the main library floor, passing wooden tables and chairs, and encountering another student near the shelves

notable_agents.action: another student in dark robes standing near the bookshelves, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with warm fire glowing
ornate red and gold patterned runner carpet on the floor
upholstered armchairs arranged for reading near the shelves
long wooden study tables with books and lamps

segments.scene_description: The character turns back into the main library hall, walking across a red carpet past reading chairs and wooden tables. Another student stands near the bookshelves as the character moves through the warm, fire-lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase descending to lower library level

events.description: begins descending wooden staircase to lower level
reaches bottom of stairs and enters lower corridor with portrait gallery

agents.ego_description: walking down a wooden staircase with iron railings, then proceeding through a lower corridor lined with portraits

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with red carpet runner descending to lower level
black wrought iron railing along the staircase edge
stone wall covered with multiple framed portraits in heavy frames
thick wooden support columns in the lower corridor

segments.scene_description: The character descends a curved wooden staircase with iron railings to a lower level, then walks through a corridor lined with portrait galleries and heavy wooden pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow lower library corridor with restricted section

events.description: enters narrower passage with restricted section signage visible

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridors between tall bookshelves, passing a wooden ladder and approaching a restricted section

entered.detail: tight rows of floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves creating narrow passages
rolling wooden library ladder leaning against the shelves
metal gate blocking access to a restricted area of the library
antique wooden storage chest with metal fittings

segments.scene_description: The character navigates narrow corridors between towering bookshelves in the lower library level, passing a wooden ladder and approaching a gated restricted section. The lighting grows dimmer in this more secluded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the airy heights of a grand library balcony down into the dim, secluded depths of its restricted archives. It begins on an upper wooden balcony overlooking a vast hall illuminated by a central chandelier and wall sconces, before turning into an intimate reading room filled with green banker's lamps and stone archways. The camera then glides through a long corridor where warm candlelight blends with cool blue light filtering through towering stained glass windows, passing a large blue globe before returning to the main hall's red carpets and fire-lit study areas. As the movement continues, the character descends a curved wooden staircase with iron railings into a lower level lined with portrait galleries and heavy pillars. Finally, the scene shifts into narrow, shadowed corridors between towering bookshelves and wooden ladders, ending as the lighting grows dimmer upon approaching a gated restricted section.
